---
title: "Software & Code"
---

## Tools, Scripts, and Reproducible Workflows

I share here code and tools related to my research and teaching. I work primarily in **R**, **Mplus**, and **Stata**.

---

<!-- Add repositories and scripts here. Example format:

### bws-network: Network Analysis of Best-Worst Scaling Data
**Language**: R  
**Packages**: `qgraph`, `bootnet`, `networktools`

Workflow for applying Gaussian Graphical Models (GGM/GLASSO) to individual-level hierarchical Bayes scores from Best-Worst Scaling studies, with discussion of ipsativity implications.

[GitHub repository](https://github.com/rgempp/bws-network)

---

### mplus-syntax: Common Psychometric Models in Mplus
**Language**: Mplus syntax

Collection of annotated Mplus syntax files for common models in organizational psychometrics:

- CFA with method effects
- MIMIC models for DIF detection
- Bifactor and second-order models
- Polytomous IRT (GRM, GPCM)
- ESEM with target rotation

[GitHub repository](https://github.com/rgempp/mplus-syntax)

-->

*This section is under construction. Code will be published as research projects allow.*

---

## Recommended Tools

- [lavaan](https://lavaan.ugent.be/) — SEM in R
- [mirt](https://philchalmers.github.io/mirt/) — Multidimensional IRT in R
- [psych](https://personality-project.org/r/psych/) — Psychometric analysis in R
- [Mplus](https://www.statmodel.com/) — Advanced statistical modeling
- [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) — Reproducible scientific publishing
